subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-03-03 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: In these days, it is time for calmness and dignity; it is time for confidence and assurance. We must rely upon God.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این ایام وقت سکون و وقاراست و تک اطمینان
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @stories; anecdotes, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
